isi.lyrics:
Lyric Pepper - Tap Out!

Romanization

I see the light in your eyes so blue
kkok irae maebeon all day through
iksukhaejil ttaejjeum go astray
ipsureun whisper your name
Like where we should be
akkyeodugin so clear to me
Eyes on the ceiling, waiting on something
anincheok Keep it calm
Yeah, this is how I lie
Keep on to find
What’s on your mind?
gyeolguk Tap out
Thought I had you mapped out
deo mal an haedo
Call you tonight
Bare light
da almyeonseo
Blur in the mirror
daedaphae beolsseo
I don’t need it, no more
But we found a different kind of love, true
gaman isseodo nothing else I need
deo malhaji anado know it
eotgalliji anke han georeum geudaero like a glow
Like where we should be
akkyeodugin so clear to me
Eyes on the ceiling, waiting on something
anincheok keep it calm
Yeah, this is how I lie

Keep on to find
What’s on your mind?
gyeolguk Tap out
Thought I had you mapped out
deo mal an haedo
Call you tonight
Bare light
da almyeonseo
Blur in the mirror
daedaphae beolsseo
I don’t need it, no more, no more
Keep on to find
What’s on your mind?
gyeolguk Tap out
Thought I had you mapped out
deo mal an haedo
Call you tonight
Bare light
da almyeonseo
Blur in the mirror
daedaphae beolsseo
I don’t need it, no more

Hangeul

I see the light in your eyes so blue
꼭 이래 매번 all day through
익숙해질 때쯤 go astray
입술은 whisper your name
Like where we should be
아껴두긴 so clear to me
Eyes on the ceiling, waiting on something
아닌척 Keep it calm
Yeah, this is how I lie
Keep on to find
What’s on your mind?
결국 Tap out
Thought I had you mapped out
더 말 안 해도
Call you tonight
Bare light
다 알면서
Blur in the mirror
대답해 벌써
I don’t need it, no more
But we found a different kind of love, true
가만 있어도 nothing else I need
더 말하지 않아도 know it
엇갈리지 않게 한 걸음 그대로 like a glow
Like where we should be
아껴두긴 so clear to me
Eyes on the ceiling, waiting on something
아닌척 keep it calm
Yeah, this is how I lie

Keep on to find
What’s on your mind?
결국 Tap out
Thought I had you mapped out
더 말 안 해도
Call you tonight
Bare light
다 알면서
Blur in the mirror
대답해 벌써
I don’t need it, no more, no more
Keep on to find
What’s on your mind?
결국 Tap out
Thought I had you mapped out
더 말 안 해도
Call you tonight
Bare light
다 알면서
Blur in the mirror
대답해 벌써
I don’t need it, no more

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Kumba and the Soul Chambers - 내 맘 속에 (Come into my heart)

Romanization

nae mamsoge deureoosillaeyo
amudo moreuge swieotda gayo

nae mamsoge deureooseyo
amudo moreuge swieotda gayo

geokjeong malgo muneul yeoseyo
nae mamsoge naega neul salgo isseuni
gidarineun deut gidariji ana
jogeuphae hal geot eopseoyo

bimilbeonhoneun dangsimmani arayo
nae mame deureooseyo

nae mamsoge deureoosyeonnayo
chado kkeuryeo masigo jollimyeon jayo

yojeumui naneun saneun geot gatayo
nae mamsoge dangsini isseuni

bimilbeonhoneun dangsimmani arayo
nae mame deureooseyo

ooo ye~


Hangeul

내 맘속에 들어오실래요
아무도 모르게 쉬었다 가요

내 맘속에 들어오세요
아무도 모르게 쉬었다 가요

걱정 말고 문을 여세요
내 맘속에 내가 늘 살고 있으니
기다리는 듯 기다리지 않아
조급해 할 것 없어요

비밀번호는 당신만이 알아요
내 맘에 들어오세요

내 맘속에 들어오셨나요
차도 끓여 마시고 졸리면 자요

요즘의 나는 사는 것 같아요
내 맘속에 당신이 있으니

비밀번호는 당신만이 알아요
내 맘에 들어오세요

오오오 예~

isi.lyrics:
Lyric pedlar - All Day

Romanization

sun lands right
sets the mood for everything
must trust the signs
give it a go and figure it out
you might let the moment pass by

hearts play a tune
her lips and my eyes are moving in sync
I gotta see what moves she makes next
if nobody finds me in time

I've been here for a while and this could go all day
tastes too sweet to wake, I just need some more to take
but I can't, I don't have all day

I've been here for a while and this has been a process
I can barely see her face, blurry with a rosy haze
I'll get going now if that's okay

summer went by
the cold was beginning to pick up
lost out here again
it's not too hard to make it all out
and I have a home to keep myself warm

far better than my day now
it's not just a thought in my head
Is there any room inside, any room inside your mind?
Is there a place my body can take?
mmm I'm still happy with where I am
things are looking okay

I've been here for a while and this could go all day
tastes too sweet to wake, I just need some more to take
but I can't, I don't have all day

I've been here for a while and this has been a process
I can barely see her face, blurry with a rosy haze
I'll get going now if that's okay

isi.lyrics:
Lyric kimseungjoo - 잔화(殘花) (Remnant Flower)

Romanization

kkochi pieotji, geomeun mudaewie
maju boatgo jeongjeogi heulleosseo
siganeun jjitgin riboncheoreom heulleo
haneopsi gogael kkeudeogineun meteuronom

neoui sonkkeuteseo twin geu papyeoni
nae simjangeul mudaero mireobeoryeosseo
biteullin seonyuldeul soge sumeun maeum
gongheohan daegisogeuro pagodeureo

aaa dasi yeogiro dorawa

garyeojin mudae dwieseo
bakja wi chumchuneun na
geu sai bulhyeobeumcheoreom meomulgo inneun ne moseup

kkochipi anin pipbangurieotdanggeol
nan ijeya ara
nae ppyame bakhin neoui rideum
magi naerinda

mareun sum sairo beonjin tteollim hana
i sungganeun wae itorok natseolkka
janhyangcheoreom ullyeooneun bakja soge
sumjugin naui jinsimeun teureojyeoga

gieok sogui naneun chaja
neoui majimak dwimmoseup
haega jeomulgo dari nuneultteo wonhaji anatdeon geimi sijakdoeeo
apeseo seoseohi, jogeumssik, sarajyeoga neowaui modeun chueok sigandeul

darui geuneure gathyeo
mudae wi noyeojin na
geu arae inhyeonggeukcheoreom maemdoneun neoui geurimja

memareun kkochip heutnallyeo
nal jamjaeudeut seureojyeoga
heuryeojineun siya sok neoui moseup
kkeutnae nae summajeo seoseohi meojeogago,

bambokdoeneun riset soge
inae majimak geugeul naeryeo
naui moksorineun nege dajiana
mueotdo alji mothanchae neoneun naaga

Hangeul

꽃이 피었지, 검은 무대위에
마주 보았고 정적이 흘렀어
시간은 찢긴 리본처럼 흘러
한없이 고갤 끄덕이는 메트로놈

너의 손끝에서 튄 그 파편이
내 심장을 무대로 밀어버렸어
비틀린 선율들 속에 숨은 마음
공허한 대기속으로 파고들어

아아아 다시 여기로 돌아와

가려진 무대 뒤에서
박자 위 춤추는 나
그 사이 불협음처럼 머물고 있는 네 모습

꽃잎이 아닌 핏방울이었단걸
난 이제야 알아
내 뺨에 박힌 너의 리듬
막이 내린다

마른 숨 사이로 번진 떨림 하나
이 순간은 왜 이토록 낯설까
잔향처럼 울려오는 박자 속에
숨죽인 나의 진심은 틀어져가

기억 속의 나는 찾아
너의 마지막 뒷모습
해가 저물고 달이 눈을떠 원하지 않았던 게임이 시작되어
앞에서 서서히, 조금씩, 사라져가 너와의 모든 추억 시간들

달의 그늘에 갇혀
무대 위 놓여진 나
그 아래 인형극처럼 맴도는 너의 그림자

메마른 꽃잎 흩날려
날 잠재우듯 스러져가
흐려지는 시야 속 너의 모습
끝내 내 숨마저 서서히 멎어가고,

반복되는 리셋 속에
이내 마지막 극을 내려
나의 목소리는 네게 닿지않아
무엇도 알지 못한채 너는 나아가

nae pibusaegeun ppoyan Powder
nan achimgwa naji oeropgo sireo bami omyeon
